question: List all student names.
sql: SELECT name FROM students LIMIT 50
summary: 15 student names: Alice Johnson, Brian Smith, Clara Lee, Daniel Green, Emily Davis, Frank Moore, Carol White, David Hill, Test User, Ethan Fox (+5 more)

question: Which students are from Seattle?
sql: SELECT students.name FROM students WHERE city = 'Seattle' LIMIT 50
summary: 1 name: Alice Johnson

question: Show students majoring in Computer Science.
sql: SELECT students.name FROM students WHERE major = 'Computer Science' LIMIT 50
summary: 2 students majorings: Alice Johnson, Daniel Green

question: Give names and GPA of students with GPA above 3.5.
sql: SELECT name, gpa FROM students WHERE gpa > 3.5 LIMIT 50
summary: 11 names: Alice Johnson, Brian Smith, Clara Lee, Emily Davis, Carol White, David Hill, Test User, Ethan Fox, Fiona King, Ivy Sun (+1 more)

question: Count students in each major.
sql: SELECT major, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM students GROUP BY major LIMIT 50
summary: 6 majors: Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, Mathematics, Physics, Undeclared

question: List courses and their instructors.
sql: SELECT title, instructor FROM courses LIMIT 50
summary: 5 courses. Example -> title: Introduction to Programming, instructor: Laura Chen

question: Which courses have 4 credits?
sql: SELECT courses.title, courses.instructor FROM courses WHERE credits = 4 LIMIT 50
summary: 3 results. Example -> title: Introduction to Programming, instructor: Laura Chen

question: Show enrollments with grade A.
sql: SELECT * FROM enrollments WHERE grade = 'A' LIMIT 50
summary: 3 enrollments: A, A, A

question: List students and their majors sorted by GPA desc.
sql: SELECT name, major FROM students ORDER BY gpa DESC LIMIT 50
summary: 15 students: Alice Johnson, Clara Lee, Emily Davis, Carol White, David Hill, Test User, Ethan Fox, Fiona King, Ivy Sun, Kelly Park (+5 more)

question: Find students from Chicago or Denver.
sql: SELECT students.name FROM students WHERE city IN ('Chicago', 'Denver') LIMIT 50
summary: 2 students: Daniel Green, Emily Davis

question: Average GPA by city.
sql: SELECT city, AVG(gpa) AS average_gpa FROM students GROUP BY city LIMIT 50

question: Top 3 students by GPA.
sql: SELECT name, gpa FROM students ORDER BY gpa DESC LIMIT 3;
summary: 3 names: Alice Johnson, Clara Lee, Emily Davis

question: How many courses does each student take?
sql: SELECT s.id AS student_id, s.name, COUNT(e.course_id) AS courses_taken FROM students s LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON s.id = e.student_id GROUP BY s.id, s.name LIMIT 50
summary: 15 names: Alice Johnson, Brian Smith, Clara Lee, Daniel Green, Emily Davis, Frank Moore, Carol White, David Hill, Test User, Ethan Fox (+5 more)

question: List students not in Denver.
sql: SELECT students.name FROM students WHERE city <> 'Denver' LIMIT 50
summary: 14 students nots: Alice Johnson, Brian Smith, Clara Lee, Emily Davis, Frank Moore, Carol White, David Hill, Test User, Ethan Fox, Fiona King (+4 more)

question: List distinct cities of students.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT city FROM students LIMIT 50
summary: 7 distinct cities: Seattle, Austin, Boston, Denver, Chicago, New York, Unknown

question: Find students with GPA between 3.4 and 3.8.
sql: SELECT students.name FROM students WHERE gpa BETWEEN 3.4 AND 3.8 LIMIT 50
summary: 10 students: Brian Smith, Emily Davis, Frank Moore, Carol White, David Hill, Test User, Ethan Fox, Fiona King, Ivy Sun, Kelly Park

question: Show students and courses they enrolled (join).
reason: Only read/write database questions are supported in this demo.

question: List students with grade B or higher in any course.
sql: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.city, s.major, s.gpa FROM students s JOIN enrollments e ON s.id = e.student_id WHERE e.grade >= 'B' LIMIT 50
summary: 5 students: Brian Smith, Daniel Green, Daniel Green, Frank Moore, Frank Moore

question: Find courses taken by Alice Johnson.
sql: SELECT c.* FROM courses c JOIN enrollments e ON c.id = e.course_id JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.id WHERE s.name = 'Alice Johnson' LIMIT 50
summary: 2 courses takens. Example -> id: 1, code: CS101, title: Introduction to Programming, instructor: Laura Chen, credits: 4

question: Which students take Database Systems?
sql: SELECT s.name FROM students s WHERE s.major = 'Database Systems' LIMIT 50
summary: No results found for 'Which students take Database Systems?'.

question: Show student name, course title, grade for all enrollments.
sql: SELECT students.name, courses.title, enrollments.grade FROM enrollments JOIN students ON enrollments.student_id = students.id JOIN courses ON enrollments.course_id = courses.id LIMIT 50
summary: 10 student name courses: Alice Johnson, Alice Johnson, Brian Smith, Brian Smith, Clara Lee, Daniel Green, Daniel Green, Emily Davis, Frank Moore, Frank Moore

question: Count enrollments per course.
sql: SELECT course_id, COUNT(*) AS enrollment_count FROM enrollments GROUP BY course_id LIMIT 50
summary: 5 course ids: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

question: List students with GPA below 3.5.
sql: SELECT students.name FROM students WHERE gpa < 3.5 LIMIT 50
summary: 4 students: Daniel Green, Frank Moore, Henry Adams, Leo Zhang

question: Find majors with more than 1 student.
sql: SELECT major FROM students GROUP BY major HAVING COUNT(id) > 1 LIMIT 50
summary: 3 majors: Computer Science, Physics, Undeclared

question: Show max GPA per major.
sql: SELECT major, MAX(gpa) AS max_gpa FROM students GROUP BY major LIMIT 50

question: List instructors teaching 3-credit courses.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT instructor FROM courses WHERE credits = 3 LIMIT 50
summary: 2 instructors teaching 3s: Marcus Hill, Caroline King

question: Find students whose name contains 'a'.
sql: SELECT students.name FROM students WHERE name LIKE '%a%' LIMIT 50
summary: 13 students: Alice Johnson, Brian Smith, Clara Lee, Daniel Green, Emily Davis, Frank Moore, Carol White, David Hill, Ethan Fox, Fiona King (+3 more)

question: Show students from New York.
sql: SELECT students.name FROM students WHERE city = 'New York' LIMIT 50
summary: 1 student: Frank Moore

summary: 15 students: Alice Johnson, Brian Smith, Clara Lee, Daniel Green, Emily Davis, Frank Moore, Carol White, David Hill, Test User, Ethan Fox (+5 more)
